info.description:
Registry-first API for immutable skill publication, indexed search candidate
retrieval, direct relationship reads, exact version retrieval, artifact streaming,
and version listing.

The server owns data-local registry operations only. Prompt interpretation,
reranking, dependency solving, final selection, lock generation, and execution
planning remain client-owned behavior outside this API boundary.
info.title: aptitude-server Service

get.description: Return compact advisory candidates from indexed metadata and description search. This route is discovery-only: it does not resolve relationships, choose a final candidate, or perform dependency solving.

parameters.description: Repeatable tag filter; all values must match.
parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Repeatable tag filter; all values must match.
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Language alias filter implemented as a normalized tag.
parameters.name: language

schema.description: Language alias filter implemented as a normalized tag.
schema.title: Language

parameters.description: Maximum age in days since publication.
parameters.name: fresh_within_days

schema.description: Maximum age in days since publication.
schema.title: Fresh Within Days

parameters.description: Maximum allowed artifact size in bytes.
parameters.name: max_footprint_bytes

schema.description: Maximum allowed artifact size in bytes.
schema.title: Max Footprint Bytes

parameters.description: Maximum number of skill candidates to return.
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of skill candidates to return.
schema.title: Limit

200.description: Compact advisory skill candidates returned successfully.

errors.msg: Value error, At least one search selector must be provided.

post.description: Return ordered exact immutable version metadata results for up to 100 requested coordinates. Each result is independent and preserves the original request order.

200.description: Ordered exact immutable metadata results returned successfully.

422.description: The request body or path parameters are invalid.

post.summary: Batch fetch exact immutable version metadata

get.description: Return the stored manifest, checksum, and a backend-agnostic artifact reference for one exact immutable skill version. This route does not inline artifact bytes.

parameters.description: Stable identifier of the skill to fetch.
parameters.name: skill_id

schema.description: Stable identifier of the skill to fetch.
schema.title: Skill Id

parameters.description: Exact immutable semantic version to fetch.
parameters.name: version

schema.description: Exact immutable semantic version to fetch.
schema.title: Version

200.description: Exact immutable skill version metadata returned successfully.

404.description: The requested immutable `skill_id@version` does not exist.

422.description: The request body or path parameters are invalid.

get.description: Stream the immutable artifact bytes for one exact `skill_id@version`. The service verifies checksum integrity before returning the payload.

parameters.description: Stable identifier of the skill to fetch.
parameters.name: skill_id

schema.description: Stable identifier of the skill to fetch.
schema.title: Skill Id

parameters.description: Exact immutable semantic version to fetch.
parameters.name: version

schema.description: Exact immutable semantic version to fetch.
schema.title: Version

404.description: The requested immutable `skill_id@version` does not exist.

422.description: The request body or path parameters are invalid.

error.message: Integrity check failed for skill version: python.lint@1.2.3

500.description: Artifact retrieval or integrity verification failed.

get.description: Return process liveness for lightweight probes.
Return dependency readiness, including a database connectivity check.

post.description: Return authored direct `depends_on` and `extends` relationships for exact immutable source versions. This route does not expand transitive graphs, select versions for constraints, or emit solved dependency closures.

200.description: Ordered direct relationship results returned successfully.

422.description: The relationship query request is invalid.

post.description: Accept multipart form data containing a JSON `manifest` string and a binary `artifact` upload. The manifest is validated at the API boundary, converted to core domain models, and persisted only if the same `skill_id@version` does not already exist.

publish.summary: Publish a new immutable skill version

errors.msg: Invalid JSON: expected value at line 1 column 1

422.description: The request is invalid or the manifest JSON violates the publish contract.

500.description: Artifact persistence failed while publishing the version.

get.description: Legacy compatibility route for advisory discovery. New clients should call `GET /discovery/skills/search`. This route remains discovery-only and does not perform relationship resolution or dependency solving.
